approach: Authoritative McKay corpus acquisition followed by fail-closed validation and strengthening of the actual-record parser audit

strategy.mechanism: A frozen byte preflight gates two exact forbidden-set evaluators, a third NetworkX graph6 signature path, nauty complementation, and canonical labeling.

hypothesis: The authoritative corpus is retrievable unchanged and can be audited through a third independent parser without weakening the source preflight.
discriminating_test: Attempt one bounded authoritative download; admit no graph unless the 47,888-byte SHA-256 discriminator matches; regression-test the new parser path on every order-7 isomorphism class and complement.
summary: The authoritative download failed DNS resolution with curl code 6 and left no corpus. The target preflight returned code 2 with downstream_checks_run=false. The corpus gate was strengthened to require NetworkX signatures on every admitted record and complement. That path passed on all 1,044 unlabeled order-7 classes and their complements, with exact checker agreement and byte-exact nauty complementation. No order-42 graph was checked and no Ramsey bound changed.
rationale: The positive result is verification infrastructure only. The exhaustive small control tests the new independent parsing obligation, while absent authenticated bytes preclude every target-instance, novelty, or repair claim.
claims: The corpus gate now requires a third NetworkX order, edge-count, and ordered-degree signature for every source record and complement.
The new path agreed with both exact checker parsers on 2,088 order-7 source/complement records.
Local graph6 complementation agreed byte-for-byte with nauty-complg on that suite.
Zero order-42 corpus records were checked.
evidence: .proof-experiments/20260720-200524-16f6f3: acquisition returned code 6 and left no source file
next_steps: Acquire unchanged r55_42some.g6 through a new network path or user-provided authoritative file with provenance.
Require 47,888 bytes, 328 LF-terminated records, and SHA-256 067902e853d87b49bcef0d1d4c0e3bbadd238ee18bc65341b079a3ca4780eccb.
Run the enhanced authenticated-corpus command recorded verbatim in CHECKPOINT.md.
Authenticate Springer Supplementary Data 4 only after the corpus passes.
Do not start unknown-42 or K43 repair search before both raw-source gates pass.
experiments: .proof-experiments/20260720-200524-16f6f3: authoritative acquisition failed with curl code 6
.proof-experiments/20260720-200920-965ada: passing regression superseded because its report omitted the imported gate hash
independent_checker: Checker A uses Python, a separate graph6 parser, and literal 5-subset enumeration. Checker B uses C, another parser, and recursive bitset clique enumeration. NetworkX 3.3 supplies a third decoding/signature path, and nauty-complg checks complement bytes. None ran on order 42 because the source was absent.
transfer_insights: Isolated adversarial reconstruction -> an external parser should expose shared graph6 errors -> NetworkX agreed on every order-7 source/complement control.
Fail-closed provenance -> missing bytes must prevent mathematical evaluation -> the strengthened gate recorded downstream_checks_run=false.

established_facts.claim: The embedded NetworkX signature path agrees with both exact checker parsers and nauty complementation on every unlabeled order-7 graph class and complement.
established_facts.scope: 1,044 source representatives and 1,044 complements at order 7 only

established_facts.claim: The maintained published range remains 43 <= R(5,5) <= 46.

ruled_out.claim_or_route: Start order-42 novelty or K43 repair search from the current packet.
ruled_out.scope: Any continuation lacking the authenticated McKay corpus and Springer seed
ruled_out.reason: The source gate failed before every target-instance check.
ruled_out.reopen_condition: The authoritative corpus passes the enhanced two-evaluator, three-parser gate.

ruled_out.reason: It presents randomized numerical diagnostics and a prime-sequence heuristic, not a witness or exhaustive exclusion.
ruled_out.reopen_condition: Supply an independently checked witness or a complete proof certificate.

open_leads.description: Authenticate the 328 McKay records and their 328 complements.
open_leads.rationale: Every novelty and canonical-comparison claim depends on these controls.
open_leads.next_experiment: Place unchanged bytes at sources/r55_42some.g6 and run the command in CHECKPOINT.md.

open_leads.description: Authenticate Springer Supplementary Data 4 after the corpus passes.
open_leads.rationale: It is the strongest published bounded-repair seed, but the local transcription lacks publisher provenance.
open_leads.next_experiment: Retrieve the unchanged TXT and require exact violation identities under both checkers.

blocker: The command environment cannot resolve the authoritative host, the browser cannot export the raw body, and no authenticated corpus exists locally.
reopen_condition: Provide or retrieve unchanged McKay bytes with provenance matching the frozen size, record count, and SHA-256 discriminator.
policy_flags: Repeated blocked strategy r55controls2026 without evidence satisfying its reopen condition.

candidate_profile.scholarly_question: Can later R(5,5) experiments use a source-authenticated control corpus with mutually independent parsing and evaluation paths?
candidate_profile.meaningful_delta: The third parser is now a mandatory per-record obligation of the eventual target gate, with its imported source hash recorded in the regression report.
candidate_profile.acceptance_test: The unchanged authoritative corpus and all complements pass the enhanced gate from a cold start and receive an independent external replay.

closest_prior_work.difference: McKay supplies the historical graphs; this artifact adds fail-closed verification plumbing and claims no new graph or classification.

novelty_searches.source: Dynamic Survey DS1.18 and targeted web/arXiv search
novelty_searches.finding: No rigorous result beyond 43 <= R(5,5) <= 46 was located; the apparent value-45 result is explicitly heuristic.

external_channel.acceptance_path: No contact or submission until authoritative raw-source replay succeeds.

independent_validations.result: Exact complement-byte and signature agreement on every order-7 class and complement

continuation.objective: Close the authoritative order-42 corpus control gate.
continuation.first_action: Acquire sources/r55_42some.g6 through a newly available path, then run the r55-authenticated-corpus-gate command in CHECKPOINT.md.
continuation.stop_condition: Stop at any byte, record, checker, NetworkX signature, forbidden-set, histogram, degree, complement, or canonical-label mismatch.

tool_disclosure: GPT-5.6 Sol was principal investigator. Two precomputed GPT-5.6 Terra memos supplied advisory reconnaissance; Sol verified their hashes and independently audited relied-on evidence. Tools used: Python 3.12.3, C/GCC, nauty 2.8.8+ds-5, NetworkX 3.3, curl, SHA-256, Git diagnostics, the experiment harness, and web search. No new subagent, SAT solver, proof assistant, or cloud job was used.; orchestration: gpt-5.6-sol principal with gpt-5.6-terra delegates.
